titles.title: I Will Sing with a Heart Full of Love

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: With every step I take You love keeps me going, In the shadow of your gaze I find my future Challenges surrounding me A faith will not fail You comfort is my shepherd. Your power my home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every morning I wake up, You is in my will Every membering His deeds My fears will dissapear, Thank you Lord for every blessing, Every day I will be Your love is the reason for my smile…
